moments.title: World Cup Final Stages
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 is reaching its climax, with semifinals this week, leading to the Bronze Final on July 18 and the Grand Final on July 19.

angles.name: Semifinals Buzz
angles.copy: Who's making it to the biggest match in football? The World Cup semifinals are LIVE this week!

angles.name: Final Countdown
angles.copy: It's almost here! The FIFA World Cup Final is just days away. Who are you backing for glory on July 19th?

angles.name: Bronze Medal Match
angles.copy: Before the big one, there's pride at stake in the World Cup Bronze Final on Saturday. Who takes third place?

moments.title: The Open Championship Tees Off
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship begins on Thursday, July 16, at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England, running until July 19.

angles.name: Golf Major Kicks Off
angles.copy: One of golf's biggest majors is here! The Open Championship begins this Thursday at Royal Birkdale. Who's lifting the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Royal Birkdale Ready
angles.copy: The iconic Royal Birkdale is set to host The Open Championship from Thursday. Get ready for four days of world-class golf.

moments.title: Wimbledon Champions Crowned
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships 2026 concluded on Sunday, July 12, with new champions crowned in the men's and women's singles.

angles.name: Wimbledon Wrap-Up
angles.copy: Still buzzing from Wimbledon? The champions were crowned over the weekend after an incredible tournament at SW19.

angles.name: Grass Court Glory
angles.copy: Who was your standout player at Wimbledon this year? Reflecting on another epic two weeks of grass court action!

moments.title: Love Island UK Finale Looming
moments.blurb: Love Island UK 2026 is heading into its final weeks, with the grand finale expected on Monday, July 27, after a summer of drama.

angles.name: Love Island Countdown
angles.copy: The Love Island 2026 finale is just around the corner! Who do you think will be crowned this year's winning couple?

angles.name: Villa Drama Continues
angles.copy: With the Love Island final in sight, expect even more twists, turns, and bombshells in the villa this week!

moments.title: The Hundred 2026 Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The Hundred, England's 100-ball cricket competition, begins its 2026 season with a double-header at The Kia Oval on July 21.

angles.name: Cricket's Fast Format Returns
angles.copy: Get ready for some rapid-fire cricket! The Hundred is back, starting July 21st with an opening double-header. Which team are you backing?

angles.name: New Season, New Names
angles.copy: The Hundred returns next week with some re-branded teams and a new auction format! Get set for the action from July 21st.

moments.title: Latitude Festival Returns
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival brings music, arts, and comedy to Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23 to 26, celebrating its 20th anniversary.

angles.name: Latitude Calling
angles.copy: Suffolk! Latitude Festival is back at Henham Park from July 23rd for its 20th anniversary. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Festival Vibes in Suffolk
angles.copy: Music, comedy, and arts - Latitude Festival kicks off next week! Are you heading to Henham Park for a long weekend of fun?

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival takes place in Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, Scotland, from July 15-18, featuring traditional and contemporary music.

angles.name: HebCelt Kicks Off
angles.copy: Heading to the Outer Hebrides? The Hebridean Celtic Festival starts tomorrow, bringing incredible music and culture to Stornoway!

angles.name: Scottish Festival Fun
angles.copy: Traditional and contemporary sounds fill the air at the Hebridean Celtic Festival, running Wednesday to Saturday. Are you there?

moments.title: Together Again Festival
moments.blurb: The Together Again Festival will be held at Bolesworth Castle in Cheshire from July 24-26, offering a celebration of music, arts, and culture.

angles.name: Cheshire Festival Bound
angles.copy: Together Again Festival is happening next weekend at Bolesworth Castle! Who's joining the celebration of music and arts?

angles.name: Family Fun in Cheshire
angles.copy: Looking for a weekend escape? Together Again Festival in Cheshire promises world-class music and a family-friendly atmosphere from July 24-26.

moments.title: UK Heatwave Continues
moments.blurb: Heatwave conditions are expected to continue across parts of England and Wales this week, with temperatures in the high 20s and low 30s.

angles.name: Another Hot Week
angles.copy: The heatwave isn't going anywhere! Expect more high temperatures and sunshine across much of the UK this week. Stay cool!

angles.name: Summer Sunshine
angles.copy: Make the most of the glorious summer weather! High pressure means plenty of dry, sunny, and very warm days ahead for most.

moments.title: Summer Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: School summer holidays for many pupils in England and Wales are set to begin around July 21-22, kicking off weeks of summer break.

angles.name: School's Out Soon!
angles.copy: For many, the summer holidays officially begin next week! Plans for adventures, staycations, or just relaxing in the sun?

angles.name: Welsh Schools Break Up
angles.copy: The countdown is on! Many Welsh schools break for summer holidays next week. What are your family's plans?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Paddy McAloon
moments.blurb: Paddy McAloon, frontman of Prefab Sprout, turns 69 today. Known for his distinctive songwriting and the band's intelligent pop hits.

angles.name: Prefab Sprout Legend
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to the brilliant Paddy McAloon of Prefab Sprout, turning 69 today! What's your favourite of his timeless tunes?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Stewart Copeland
moments.blurb: Stewart Copeland, legendary drummer for The Police, celebrates his 74th birthday on Thursday, July 16.

angles.name: Police Drummer's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday this Thursday to the incredible Stewart Copeland, powerhouse drummer of The Police! What's your top Police track?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Geezer Butler
moments.blurb: Terence 'Geezer' Butler, the iconic bassist and lyricist for Black Sabbath, turns 77 on Friday, July 17.

angles.name: Sabbath Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 77th Birthday to the one and only Geezer Butler of Black Sabbath this Friday! What's your favourite Sabbath riff?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Brian May
moments.blurb: Brian May, the legendary guitarist of Queen, celebrates his 79th birthday on Saturday, July 19.

angles.name: Queen Guitar God
angles.copy: A huge Happy 79th Birthday to the iconic Brian May of Queen this Saturday! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Carlos Santana
moments.blurb: The legendary guitarist Carlos Santana, known for his unique blend of rock, Latin, and jazz, turns 79 on Sunday, July 20.

angles.name: Santana's Birthday
angles.copy: Celebrating the 79th Birthday of the incredible Carlos Santana this Sunday! Which Santana track gets you grooving?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Donny Osmond
moments.blurb: The enduring pop star and entertainer, Donny Osmond, celebrates his 69th birthday on Tuesday, July 22.

angles.name: Donny's Day
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 69th Birthday to the one and only Donny Osmond this Tuesday! What's your favourite song from his incredible career?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Slash
moments.blurb: Slash, the iconic lead guitarist of Guns N' Roses, known for his top hat and incredible riffs, turns 61 on Wednesday, July 23.

angles.name: Guns N' Roses Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Happy 61st Birthday this Wednesday to the legendary Slash! What's your all-time favourite GNR track featuring his iconic guitar work?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Jennifer Lopez
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday on Thursday, July 24.

angles.name: JLo's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a fabulous 57th Birthday to the one and only JLo this Thursday! What's your go-to Jennifer Lopez hit?
